name: sre-crew-autogen
description: BYO AutoGen SRE crew. Three conversational agents (Diagnostician, Planner, Operator) take turns in a RoundRobinGroupChat to resolve a Kubernetes incident. Runs as a BYO kagent agent via a thin A2A shim; LLM and tools route through agentgateway.

skills.name: Resolve a Kubernetes incident
skills.description: Diagnose a failing workload, plan the fix, and apply it.
